category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Thailand EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Thailand TISI EV charging standards, MEA / PEA utility coordination, IEC Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, charging-station policy, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与泰国 TISI 电动汽车充电标准、MEA / PEA 电网协调、IEC Type 2 / CCS2 接口预期、充电站政策及安全/EMC证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與泰國 TISI 電動汽車充電標準、MEA / PEA 電網協調、IEC Type 2 / CCS2 介面預期、充電站政策及安全/EMC證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TISI compulsory-standard scope determination, MEA or PEA grid-connection approval, ERC licensing assessment, investment-incentive determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Thai TISI, MEA, PEA, ERC, electrical-installation, incentive, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TISI强制标准适用范围裁定、MEA或PEA并网批准、ERC许可评估、投资激励判定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行泰国TISI、MEA、PEA、ERC、电气安装、激励政策及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TISI強制標準適用範圍裁定、MEA或PEA併網批准、ERC許可評估、投資激勵判定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行泰國TISI、MEA、PEA、ERC、電氣安裝、激勵政策及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Thailand, the main gaps are TISI / IEC 61851 technical alignment, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to the IEC Type 2 / CCS2 ecosystem where specified, MEA or PEA utility connection review, charging-station policy and licensing context, and safety / EMC evidence. Do not assume a blanket mandatory whole-unit TISI certificate without checking the exact charger type, rating, installation route, and latest TISI compulsory-standard list.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入泰国时，主要差距包括 TISI / IEC 61851 技术对应、在指定时从 GB/T 20234 改为 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 接口体系、MEA 或 PEA 电网接入审查、充电站政策与许可背景，以及安全/EMC证据。不得在未核对具体充电桩类型、额定参数、安装路径及最新 TISI 强制标准清单前，假定存在整机统一强制 TISI 证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入泰國時，主要差距包括 TISI / IEC 61851 技術對應、在指定時從 GB/T 20234 改為 IEC Type 2 / CCS2 介面體系、MEA 或 PEA 電網接入審查、充電站政策與許可背景，以及安全/EMC證據。不得在未核對具體充電樁類型、額定參數、安裝路徑及最新 TISI 強制標準清單前，假定存在整機統一強制 TISI 證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, energy regulator, investment authority, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
